hero.name: Ali Youssef
hero.subtitle: Crafting visual stories that resonate — from commercial campaigns to narrative films.

about.heading: Telling stories through the edit.
about.bio1: Ali Youssef is a Beirut-based video editor with a decade of experience crafting cinematic narratives for brands, directors, and artists across the Middle East and Europe.
about.bio2: His approach blends precise rhythm, emotional pacing, and an obsession with color — transforming raw footage into stories that linger.

videos.title: Pulse — Luxury Automotive Campaign
videos.desc: A high-octane commercial for a leading automotive brand.

videos.title: Echoes of the Mountain
videos.desc: Feature documentary exploring remote communities in northern Lebanon.

videos.title: Golden Hour — Official Music Video
videos.desc: Directed and edited for rising indie artist, shot in one continuous golden hour.

videos.title: The Last Train
videos.desc: Short narrative film exploring themes of memory and departure.

videos.title: Bloom — Fragrance Campaign
videos.desc: Soft, sensory-driven campaign for a French perfume house.

videos.title: Between Tides
videos.desc: A poetic documentary portrait of fishermen along the Lebanese coast.

videos.title: Shattered — Music Video
videos.desc: Conceptual performance piece with in-camera visual effects.

videos.title: The Room on the Third Floor
videos.desc: Award-winning short film selected at Beirut International Film Festival.

videos.title: Rise — Athletic Brand Film
videos.desc: Motivational brand film for a regional sports apparel launch.
